name: ng-checkbox
title: Checkbox (Angular)
description: Binary checkbox built on Spartan-ng brain Checkbox. Use for multi-select lists, terms acceptance, settings toggles. For mutually exclusive choices use RadioGroup; for on/off use Switch. Mirrors React Checkbox from @gremorie/rx-forms.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-checkbox.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
